name: Battle of the Oranges
traditions: Three-day orange battle between teams on foot and on carts; historical costume parade; bonfire of scarli; election of Mugnaia (heroine).
historicalBackground: The Battle of the Oranges commemorates a medieval rebellion against a tyrant. The Mugnaia represents a miller's daughter who led the revolt.
description: Italy's most unusual carnival, where thousands engage in a massive orange-throwing battle reenacting a medieval rebellion in Piedmont.
